都内唯一の屋台ラーメン🍜 ◆チャーシュー麺 (¥950) [トッピング] 味玉 (¥100) 玉ねぎ (¥50) 海苔 (¥50) ほうれん草 (¥100) 八王子にある都内で唯一の屋台ラーメン！ 都心から離れているのに行列のできる人気店 日本ならではの屋台ラーメンは趣のある雰囲気と一度食べたら忘れられない味 カウンター席とテーブル席があるがカウンター席は予約することも可能。(詳しくはお店のアカウントをチェック) ≪店舗詳細≫ 【店舗名】屋台ラーメン しゅんやっちゃん 【住所】東京都八王子市初沢町1277-8  【営業時間】18:00〜23:00 【定休日】月曜・日曜   #東京グルメ #八王子グルメ #屋台ラーメン   ====================================   Tokyo’s Only Yatai Ramen Stand in the City 🍜 ◆ Chashu Ramen (¥950) [Toppings] Ajitama Egg (¥100) Onion (¥50) Nori Seaweed (¥50) Spinach (¥100) A one-of-a-kind yatai-style ramen stand in Tokyo, located in Hachioji! Even though it’s far from central Tokyo, people line up for this incredibly popular spot. This traditional Japanese street-style ramen offers a nostalgic atmosphere and an unforgettable flavor you’ll keep craving. There are both counter and table seats available, and you can even reserve the counter seats in advance. (Check the shop’s account for details!) ≪Shop Information≫ 【Shop Name】Shunyacchan Yatai Ramen 【Address】1277-8 Hatsuzawamachi, Hachioji, Tokyo 【Hours】18:00–23:00 【Closed】Mondays & Sundays   #japanesefood

What is it like to get a Korean skincare treatment that is illegal in the US?  South Korea’s beauty industry, or “K-beauty,” generates about $12 billion domestically; its global export market is worth another $10 billion. Social media drives much of the industry’s recent growth, as Korean culture in general has become more popular among western audiences (see, for example, K-pop and K-drama). At 41, @thebenkawaller crossed the globe for Rejuran, a skin treatment that’s illegal in the US. Was the pain — and the four-figure price tag — worth it? *For news purposes* #rejuran#kbeauty #koreanskincare #skincare

The 20 YEAR OLD who went from HOMELESS to $1.7M 🤯💻 Two years ago… she was sleeping in her car with $93 to her name Today? She’s built a 7-figure Amazon business selling dog beds I asked her how she did it, and she said it came down to strategy focusing on niche, higher-ticket products instead of saturated markets But it wasn’t easy She got banned from Etsy worked multiple jobs to fund her business and sacrificed the lifestyle most people her age are chasing What stood out most her mindset She calls it “delusional self-belief” and full faith in God that it would work out Lastly, I asked her what advice she’d give to anyone starting out and her answer focus on skills and take full accountability for your life #e#entrepreneura#amazonfbam#millionairemindsetm#motivationecommerce

Well-placed fillers aren’t about “adding volume everywhere.” They’re about enhancing anatomy, restoring lost volume, and creating balance in the right areas. Now add a calorie deficit — and you get a double effect: the face becomes more defined, excess fullness goes away, and the fillers look even cleaner, sharper, and more natural. It’s the combination of: ✨ precise placement ✨ a controlled calorie deficit that creates that “expensive” look — fresh, sculpted, and harmonious without being overdone.

This routine is for anyone who is not dealing with extreme damage but wants over all glossier & softer hair this is the the exact routine I built for getting glass hair on fine hair but will work for the wavy curly hair girls too!!  the science: the flatten your cuticle lies, the more light it reflects that's what gives the illusion of glass. glossy hair isn't a product, it's the consistency of routine over time that’s keeping that cuticle smooth from prewash to final styling  it took me a while to figure out the system, but once I did, the results compounded and now I wanna share my favourite tips with you because this is the routine that actually for every  wash day. the 5 things I never skip: 1. always create a barrier before shampoo: hair oil or conditioner first. less friction = less cuticle damage = more shine 2. weekly hair mask. deep hydration is what keeps that cuticle flat and the shine consistent. 3. a glossing treatment every 3-4 weeks  this is the step that takes glossy to glass  4. leave-in conditioner every single wash. beats frizz and keeps the cuticle flat between washes. 5. the hair sandwich method oil before heat styling AND after. then always finish with a cool shot to lock the cuticle in place ✨ Hope these haircare tips help you guys!! #hair #haircare #glasshair #hairgloss

“Dog lovers” vs dog lovers when it comes to greeting dogs! ETA: “dog lovers” could also be replaced with “uniformed, uneducated, and/or inconsiderate dog lovers” vs “informed, educated, and considerate dog lovers” if that makes you more comfortable 🫶 One of my biggest pet peeves is people baby talking to my dog and pretending like I’m interrupting? Bizarre! And in case you didn’t know because it’s something that’s been so normalized, putting your hands in dogs’ faces is unsafe. Dogs don’t need to sniff you up close like that and it’s putting unneeded pressure on them (often leading to bites). The best way to greet a dog is calm, neutral, and honestly just ignoring them. If you want to say hi to a dog, ask the owner first. Try to make yourself small by turning to the side and crouching. Allow the dog to approach you first. Some dogs are super friendly and love people! This doesn’t mean it’s ok to pet or approach without asking their handler! The safest way to greet any dog is by admiring from afar. Admittedly, if I know someone’s dog well, I might be a bit of the former “dog lover” and be excitedly greeting them 😂 It’s different when you know the dog! 한 그릇만 주문해도, 커다란 양푼에서 바로 만들어주는 의정부 비빔국수 📍의정부제일시장 '영선네 잔치국수' (주소: 경기 의정부시 태평로73번길 20 서52호) 🔗네이버 지도 링크: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢비빔국수 8천원 의정부 제일시장의 오랜 내공이 담긴 국수 맛집, '영선네'입니다. ​이곳의 인기 비결은 주문 즉시 커다란 양푼에서 사장님이 직접 손맛으로 무쳐주시는 비빔국수입니다. 한자리에서만 무려 20년 동안 변함없는 맛을 이어온 진정한 노포 국수 맛집으로, ​매일 아침부터 점심시간까지는 든든하게 한 끼 식사를 해결하러 오시는 손님들로 발 디딜 틈이 없습니다. ​아삭아삭한 식감의 콩나물이 듬뿍 올라간 비빔국수와 사장님이 직접 정성껏 담그신 열무김치의 조합은 그야말로 일품인데요🤤 입맛 당기는 매콤새콤한 비빔국수를 좋아하시는 분들이라면 꼭 한번 방문해 보세요! - Made in a Giant Mixing Bowl! The Legendary 20-Year Hand-Mixed Spicy Noodles 📍 Yeong-seonne Noodles, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢 Spicy Mixed Noodles (Bibim-guksu): 8,000 KRW Welcome to 'Yeong-seonne,' a noodle spot in Uijeongbu Jeil Market with years of expertise. The secret to its popularity is the spicy mixed noodles, hand-tossed by the owner in a giant mixing bowl (Yangpun) immediately after ordering. It’s a true hidden gem that has maintained the same delicious taste in the same spot for over 20 years. From early morning through lunch, it’s always packed with locals looking for a hearty meal. The combination of spicy noodles topped with crunchy bean sprouts and homemade young summer radish kimchi (Yeolmu-kimchi) is simply superb! 🤤 If you love mouth-watering, sweet, and spicy noodles, this is a must-visit spot! #서울맛집 #의정부맛집 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

8 astuces pour réviser pendant des heures sans perdre ta concentration ✨ 🎯 Commence par la tâche la plus difficile Tu es beaucoup au début de ta session et surtout le matin. Profites-en pour avancer sur les tâches qui te demandent le plus d’effort. ⏳ Travaille par session de travail (méthode Pomodoro) Au lieu d’essayer de travailler 6h d’affilée, fais des sessions de 45 à 90 minutes avec de vraies pauses entre chaque session. Tu seras beaucoup plus efficace sur le long terme. 📵 Évite la “dopamine rapide” pendant les pauses Scroller TikTok ou répondre à des messages risque de te fatiguer encore plus et surtout de te déconcentrer. Fais plutôt une pause sans écran : marche, étirements, eau, snack… 🧠 Sois actif dans tes révisions Ne relis pas seulement ton cours. Teste-toi, explique à voix haute, fais des exercices ou utilise l’active recall. C’est ce qui aide vraiment à mémoriser. 🎧 Garde la même routine de travail Même playlist, même bureau, même routine… Tu finiras par associer cet environnement au fait d’être concentré et productif, donc tu te mets plus rapidement au travail. 💧 Mange et hydrate-toi régulièrement Tu as besoin d’énergie pour rester concentré longtemps. Bois de l’eau et prends des petites pauses pour éviter les grosses baisses d’énergie, mais évite les sucres rapides. 🔒 Évite de changer constamment de tâche Passer d’une matière à une autre toutes les 10 minutes casse complètement ton attention. Essaie de regrouper les tâches similaires pour rester dans le même rythme. 📋 Découpe ton travail en objectifs précis et avec un plan Avant de commencer ta session, fixe-toi plutôt des objectifs clairs : finir un chapitre, faire 10 exercices, apprendre une fiche… 💌 Enregistre ce post pour tes prochaines longues sessions de révision✨ 🙌🏻 Partage-le à un.e ami.e qui en aurait besoin Et abonne-toi pour d’autres conseils études & productivité 📚 #studytok #productivite #etudes #studywithme #studymotivation

My top 10 cookies in London! Where do I need to try next? *this is just my personal opinion and it is seriously hard to choose just 10 with all of the incredible places in London! 🍪 #london #londonfood #londonbakery #londonfoodguide #londoncookies

Bakery style chocolate chip cookies 🍪  Ingredients  3/4 cup (170g) unsalted butter, cold and cubed  3/4 cup (150g) dark brown sugar 1/3 cup (65g) granulated sugar 1 large egg + 1 egg yolk, room temp 2 tsp vanilla bean paste 2 cups (240g) all-purpose flour 1 tsp cornstarch 1 tsp espresso powder 1/2 tsp baking soda 1 tbsp milk powder  1/4 tsp baking powder 3/4 tsp salt 1 cup semi sweet chocolate chips 3/4 milk chocolate chips  Flaky sea salt for topping Method : In a bowl add all purpose flour, baking soda, baking powder, milk powder, espresso powder , corn starch and salt. Mix well to combine. In a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, add the cold cubed butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar. Mix on medium speed for about 2–3 minutes, until the mixture looks creamy.  Add the egg, egg yolk, and vanilla bean paste. Mix until fully combined, scraping down the sides of the bowl as needed. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture. Mix on low speed just until combined—do not overmix. Stir in the semi-sweet and milk chocolate chips until evenly distributed.  Cover and refrigerate the dough for at least 2 hours ( or up to 24 hours for deeper flavor and thicker cookies). Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Scoop large portions of dough (about ounce each) and roll loosely into balls. For a bakery look, keep them tall rather than flattened. Bake for 15-16 minutes, or until Edges are set and lightly golden. Centers are still soft and slightly underbaked. Sprinkle flaky sea salt on top immediately after baking. Let cookies cool on the baking sheet for 5–10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack. #cookies #cookierecipes #chocolatechip #cookierecipe

매일 새벽 손으로 직접 만드는 수제만두, 젊은 사장님에게서 느껴지는 '할머니의 손맛' 📍망원 연만두  (주소: 서울 마포구 망원로 77 1층 연만두)   🔗네이버 지도: https://naver.me/5Kb3ejlY   🥟만두 한 판 8,500원 / 왕치즈군만두 1개 2,500원   📦택배 신청: 매주 월요일 오후 5시까지 문자 접수 (연락처: 010-5941- 7816)   망원시장의 소문난 만두 맛집 '연만두'. 많은 분이 연세 지긋한 할머니가 운영하실 거라 오해할 만큼 깊은 손맛을 자랑하는 곳입니다. 하지만 이곳의 주인공은 만두에 인생을 건 젊은 사장님이었는데요.  그 깊은 맛의 비결은 진심어린 정성에 있었습니다.  "기계는 재료를 뭉개버린다"는 철학 아래, 매일 새벽부터 나와 모든 재료를 일일이 손으로 버무리고 직접 빚으시더라구요. 재료 하나하나의 식감이 살아있는 꽉 찬 만두 속은 그렇게 사장님의 고집으로 완성됩니다.  워낙 정성껏 소량만 준비하기 때문에 금세 품절되기로 유명한데요. 방문 전 전화 주문이나 네이버 예약을 이용하시면 헛걸음 없이 바로 가져가실 수 있으니 꼭 참고하세요!   주문 즉시 튀겨주시는 치즈 군만두는 갓 튀겨낸 바삭한 식감 속에 고소하게 늘어나는 치즈와 만두 속의 조화가 그야말로 환상적입니다.. 정성과 맛, 어느 하나 빠지지 않는 망원동의 진정한 인생 만두를 만나보세요!   - Deep flavor hand-mixed every dawn: Finding 'Grandmother's Touch' in a Young Master 📍망원 연만두 'Yeon-Mandu' (77, Mangwon-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea)   🔗 https://maps.app.goo.gl/jDhS1Q11mVTn1mBA9   'Yeon-Mandu' is a renowned dumpling spot near Mangwon Market, famous for a deep, traditional flavor that leads many to assume an elderly grandmother must be running the shop. Surprisingly, the true master behind these dumplings is a young man who has dedicated his life to this craft.   The secret to such profound flavor lies in his sincere devotion. Following his philosophy that "machines crush the ingredients' texture," he starts his day in the early hours of the dawn, hand-mixing and folding every single dumpling. This stubborn commitment is what creates the perfect filling, where the texture of each ingredient remains intact and vibrant.   Because each dumpling is made with such meticulous care in limited quantities, they are famous for selling out quickly. We highly recommend placing a phone order or using Naver Reservation before your visit to ensure you don't miss out!  Don't miss the Cheese Fried Dumplings, fried to order for a perfectly crispy texture. The harmony of the savory, melting cheese and the rich dumpling filling is simply heavenly. Come and experience a true "life-changing" dumpling in Mangwon-dong, where passion and tradition meet! 🥟 #서울맛집 #망원동 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood
